title: Dragon Block C Reimagined
description: A Reimagination of the classic Dragon Block C textures!
body:
![A logo saying "Dragon Block C Reimagined"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fdfe218cd21e8b7ebee03323d07d932489c9404.png)This is a reimagination of the classic Dragon Block C textures for Minecraft 1.7.10!!
It's an ongoing project, from time to time I plan to update it, so please let me know what you want to see next!!

If you wish to contact me for collaborations or anything else, message me at @gnocchis_skins on discord!


## What's New on V4?
REWORKS!!
Changed, tweaked or improved all items (Dragon Balls, discs, scouters, everything related to swords, barber scissors & comb, saibaman seed, senzu bean, all weights, space pod, flying nimbuses, medicinal moss, chips, otherworld armors) and some other stuff (Cloud Block, dnomanoid armor texture, data sheet gui icons, and a few more things).



# **. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁ ⟡ Textures Changed ⟡ ݁ . ⊹ ₊ ݁.**

### -= GUI =-
- Main GUI
- Concentration Training GUI
- Master's GUI
- Hair Comb GUI

### -= Players =-
- Human, Sayians, Namekians & Majin Models
- SSJ4 & Ozaru Form Models

### -= Blocks =-
- Dragon Ball's (Earth & Namek, Items & Blocks)
- Colored Stones (All of Them)
- Stone Patterns (All of Them)
- Dirty Stone
- Cobbled Dirty Stone
- Stony Dirt
- Namek Grass
- Ajisa Wood
- Ajisa Leaves
- Ajisa Sappling
- Medicinal Moss (Item & Block)
- Healing Fluid
- Barrier Block﻿
- Border Block
- Cloud Block 
 
### -= Ores =-
Anything related to:
- Lehnori
- Dnomaid
- Dlog
- Jjay
- Warenai Crystal
- Katchin Shard 
  
### -= Crafting Components =-
- Chips (Tier 1, 2 & 3)
- Fabric
- Strong Fabric
- Warenai Fabric
- Yanemba Essence
- Small Club

### -= Food =-
- Senzu Bean
- Dinosaur Meat (Both Normal & Big, Either Raw or Cooked)

### -= Weapons =-
- Sword Handle & Blade Items (All of Them)
- Z Sword
- Brave Sword
- Katana
- Evil Spear
- Dimension Sword
- Power Pole (Slightly)
  
### -= Utility =-
- Scouters (All of Them)
- Dragon Radar (Item)
- Discs (All of Them)
- Saibaman Seed
- Flying Nimbus (+ Dark Flying Nimbus [​ITEMS])
- Space Pod (Item)

### -= Customization =-
- Body Suits
- Hair Comb
- Halo
- Angel's Halo
- Barrier Of Light

### -= Clothes Sets =-
- Namekian
- Demon Clan
- Body Suits
- Future
- Whis
- King Kai
- Yamcha
- Emperor Pilaf
- Metamoran
- Battle Armors (Blue, Both Blacks, White, Light Blue & Bardock's)
- GI's (Orange, Blue, Tank Top & With Sleeves)
- Uub
- General Blue
- Android's (16 & 17)
- Jin Ryu's

### -= Weights =-
- Shell Weight
- T-Shirt Weight
- Arm & Leg Weights
- Cape Weight
- Heavy Suit Weight

### -= Masters=-
- Kami
- Karin
- Future Trunks (Base & SSJ)
- Mutten Roshi
- Piccolo
- Goku
- Gohan
- Vegeta
- Whis
- North Kaio
- Jin

### -= Mobs =-
- Hell Ogres (Blue & Red)
- Namekians (1 to 4)
- Shadow Dummy
- Saibaman
- Paozusaurus
- Namek Frog
- Sayians (Both)
- Red Ribbon Soldiers (All Variants)

### -= NPCs =-
- Enma Daio-Sama

### -= Mod Compability =-
- Et Futurum Requiem (Deepslated Ores)

### - SLIGHT CHANGES -
- Halo Color

# 
I really recommend pairing this with a texture pack that adds the new 1.14+ textures, such as MC New Textures or Modernity, as they were the main inspiration for this resource pack. But it's totally optional, this pack works perfectly fine without them.

I hope you'll enjoy it!
